microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling capabilities** that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned drill execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation standard.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring strict access control and zero data leakage.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — demonstrating hands-on experience delivering production LLM-powered tooling at enterprise scale.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of AI-driven code generation workflows by conducting **live technical demos and training sessions** across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and accelerating feature delivery cycles.

Identified critical product gaps through **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure engineering teams, directly influencing roadmap prioritization to include intent-based YAML generation as a high-demand capability.

Improved data retrieval and documentation quality by migrating to an **AI-powered semantic search** system with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and reducing friction for internal technical audiences.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a **technical roadmap** to automate critical execution paths and eliminate recurring operational toil at scale.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking automation gaps and manual toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to prioritize high-impact investments and justify resourcing for platform-level solutions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the legacy transition strategy, mapping software and hardware dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating cross-functional technical execution.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release overhead for robotics fleet software.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, triaging and resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and unblock time-sensitive deployment milestones.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing end-to-end scoping and invoicing for 200+ monthly proposals and rebuilding the CRM process to enforce consistent data capture, pipeline hygiene, and follow-up workflows.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the company website and Google Business profile for local search performance.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records to identify margin leaks and recommend data-driven adjustments to the estimating and invoicing model.
